name: AV Evaluation Agent - n8n Orchestration Layer
description: n8n orchestration layer for the autonomous-vehicle evaluation agent. Actual agent intelligence runs in the FastAPI backend. Long CARLA/OpenCDA runs are submitted via the separate async workflow with webhook path /webhook/av-eval-agent-async.

nodes.name: 8. GPT AutoTuneAgent
nodes.notes: Calls the backend GPT/fallback AutoTuneAgent. It proposes bounded YAML patches for the next CARLA/OpenCDA run and forwards them into the Slack human-review loop.

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $input.first().json;
const agentSummary = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(ctx.agents || {}).map(([name, value]) => [name, value?.status || value?.agent || 'done']));
return [{ json: {
  success: !ctx.failed,
  run_id: ctx.run_id || null,
  failed_agent: ctx.failed_agent || null,
  error: ctx.error || null,
  response_code: ctx.response_code || (ctx.failed_agent === 'WebhookAuthGate' ? 401 : (ctx.failed ? 500 : 200)),
  backend_health: ctx.backend_health || null,
  long_run_guard: ctx.long_run_guard || null,
  security: ctx.security || null,
  reproducibility: ctx.reproducibility || null,
  preflight: ctx.preflight || null,
  tool_count: ctx.tool_registry?.tools?.length || 0,
  agent_summary: agentSummary,
  status_url: ctx.run_id ? `${ctx.base_url}/pipeline/status/${ctx.run_id}` : null,
  result_url: ctx.run_id ? `${ctx.base_url}/run/result/${ctx.run_id}` : null,
  failure_diagnosis: ctx.failure_diagnosis || null,
  quality_gate: ctx.quality_gate || null,
  research_readiness: ctx.research_readiness || ctx.agents?.ResearchReadinessAgent || null,
  human_review: ctx.human_review || null,
  slack_notification: ctx.slack_notification || null,
  feedback_loop: ctx.feedback_loop || null,
  report_agent: ctx.agents?.ReportAgent || null,
  memory_agent: ctx.memory || null
}}];

nodes.name: Slack HITL notification
nodes.notes: Fallback Slack preview/webhook node. Disconnected while native Slack approval is active.

nodes.name: Slack HITL approval
nodes.notes: Optional native Slack send-and-wait approval node. Disabled in submission-safe default route; enable and connect after deployment credential review.

nodes.name: Slack approval routing
nodes.notes: Default route is non-blocking fallback to avoid credential-dependent workflow failure. Connect to Slack HITL approval in deployment when credential and channel are configured.
